posts.author: baking_with_bess
posts.text: Finally cracked the recipe for my sourdough loaves! Tasted the crumb this morning and it's perfectly airy. Just wanted to share a bit of weekend joy. #BreadBaking #Sourdough
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal update sharing a creative hobby and cooking achievement.
posts.bio: Creative projects, food and weekend interests.

posts.author: LocalGuide_42
posts.text: Honestly, the council needs to stop with these ridiculous fines for 'loitering' in Oakhaven parks. I've been sitting on a bench reading my book since 8am and suddenly get told to move because 'it's too quiet'. It's not loitering, it's relaxing! #Oakhaven #ParkLife
posts.explanation: The post expresses a lawful opinion about local government policy without containing threats, abuse or harmful misinformation.
posts.bio: Everyday thoughts, hobbies and local life.

posts.author: NorthbridgeLibrarian
posts.text: Just wanted to drop a quick note that the community noticeboard is being redecorated this week. We'll be doing some light maintenance on Tuesday and Wednesday, so please don't post flyers before Thursday morning. Thanks for your patience! #CommunityNotice
posts.explanation: This is a benign public information notice about local library maintenance with no policy violations.
posts.bio: Fictional community notices and service updates.

posts.author: SunnyHill34
posts.text: Hi everyone! Just a quick reminder to update your security settings. Please click here [link removed] and enter your current password and 2FA code to 'verify' your account before we process your payment today. Don't miss out on the special offer! #SecureNow #PaymentUpdate
posts.explanation: This is an obvious phishing attempt asking for sensitive credentials like a password and security code via a link, which violates fraud policies.
posts.bio: Account help, listings and payment updates.

posts.author: MoorvaleWatcher_92
posts.text: Has anyone else seen this video circulating? It shows a massive fire at the Bellmere plant and claims workers are trapped inside. The footage is labelled 'BREAKING NEWS' but something feels off about the audio quality compared to other reports. Is this real or fake? #Bellmere #FireSafety
posts.explanation: This case requires specialist investigation into the media's authenticity due to the serious public-safety implications and the potential for synthetic manipulation.
